meta.notes: Le azioni reali (Teams/Outlook) verranno collegate via Power Automate nel dispatcher.

sections.title: 1️⃣ Pre-Kick-Off Preparation (Before the Meeting) — Objectives & Scope Readiness

items.text: Project objectives clearly defined and documented

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Project objectives
request.message: Please share the latest document defining the project objectives.

items.text: Business goals and technical goals aligned

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Goals alignment
request.message: Please confirm business and technical goals alignment (or share alignment notes).

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: KPIs / success criteria
request.message: Please provide the agreed success criteria and KPIs (or draft for review).

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Scope definition
request.message: Please provide in-scope/out-of-scope definition or scope statement.

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Contract assumptions
request.message: Please confirm contractual assumptions are validated (or share open items).

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Constraints/dependencies
request.message: Please share known constraints/dependencies and owners.

items.text: Initial list of open points prepared

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Open points list
request.message: Please share the initial list of open points and who owns each item.

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Stakeholder list
request.message: Please provide/confirm the full stakeholder list (internal & external).

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Roles & responsibilities
request.message: Please share roles/responsibilities definition (draft ok).

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: RACI
request.message: Please share the RACI matrix for validation.

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Decision makers
request.message: Please confirm decision makers and decision scope.

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Escalation path
request.message: Please provide the escalation path and escalation rules.

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Governance model
request.message: Please share the governance model (steerco, cadence, reporting).

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: KOM objectives
request.message: Please confirm KOM objectives and expected outcomes.

items.text: Detailed agenda prepared and shared in advance

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Agenda
request.message: Please share the KOM agenda (time-boxed) with outcomes per session.

items.text: Agenda time-boxed with clear outcomes per session

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Time-boxing/outcomes
request.message: Please add time-boxing and session outcomes to the agenda.

items.text: Time allocated for discussion and Q&A

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Q&A slot
request.message: Please ensure agenda includes dedicated discussion/Q&A slot.

items.text: Breaks and informal interaction moments planned

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Breaks
request.message: Please confirm breaks/informal moments in the agenda.

items.text: Kick-Off presentation finalized and internally aligned

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Kick-off deck
request.message: Please share the final kick-off deck (internal alignment done).

items.text: Key reference documents available and versioned

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Reference docs
request.message: Please upload/share key reference docs with version info.

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Timeline/milestones
request.message: Please provide project timeline and milestone plan.

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Risk register
request.message: Please share the pre-populated risk register (draft ok).

items.text: Open technical / organizational questions clearly formulated

request.subject: [KOM] Missing: Open questions
request.message: Please provide the list of open technical/organizational questions.

sections.title: 2️⃣ Kick-Off Execution (During the Meeting) — Opening & Alignment

items.text: Project objectives and success criteria reviewed
Expectations on collaboration, quality, and timing aligned

sections.title: 2️⃣ Kick-Off Execution — Ways of Working & Governance
2️⃣ Kick-Off Execution — Scope, Technical & Product Alignment

items.text: Missing inputs or definitions clearly identified
Required samples, data, or inputs identified with owners and deadlines

sections.title: 2️⃣ Kick-Off Execution — KPIs, Quality & Acceptance Criteria

items.text: Grey areas documented as open points

sections.title: 2️⃣ Kick-Off Execution — Compliance, Safety & Regulations (if applicable)

items.text: Project timeline reviewed milestone by milestone

sections.title: 3️⃣ Planning Confirmation — Testing, Installation & Support (if applicable)
4️⃣ Closure of the Kick-Off Meeting — Decisions & Next Steps

items.text: Actions, owners, and deadlines clearly assigned

sections.title: 4️⃣ Closure of the Kick-Off Meeting — Formal Closure

items.text: Minutes of Meeting (MoM) issued and shared
Decisions and actions tracked in project tools
Risks and open points actively monitored
